Visit Graduation Office of the Registrar The steward of your academic information and oversight of all records under the Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act Explore Our Services Welcome to the Office of the Registrar This office supports the academic mission of Southern Illinois University Edwardsville by ensuring the accuracy, integrity, and security of your official academic records and supporting the institutional mission for undergraduate, graduate and professional education. The Office of the Registrar provides excellent customer service to our students, faculty members, administrators, alumni and the general public in the domain of academic facilities management, athletic and veteran eligibility certification, registration, academic scheduling, data analysis, institutional planning, and record-keeping. We also provide our campus community support in initiatives that relate to academic policies, recruitment, enrollment, retention and graduation. About Us Meet the staff and ask your questions. Forms Find faculty and student forms. Calendars & Key Dates Find calendars, deadlines, records and schedules. Services Information for registration, scheduling and records.
